hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE "(rm -rf /|rm -rf ~|> /dev/sd|mkfs\.|dd if=|chmod -R 777|curl.*\|.*bash|wget.*\|.*bash)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Dangerous command detected: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.py$"; then if command -v ruff &>/dev/null; then ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi'
